highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 4.151.0 adds FreeType-based font rendering for Windows Nano Server containers.

bullets.lead: Windows Nano Server font support via FreeType
bullets.detail: SkiaSharp now uses FreeType for font rendering on Windows Nano Server, enabling text drawing in containerized environments that lack the standard GDI font stack.

contributor_summaries.jeffska: Added FreeType-based font support for Windows Nano Server environments
